ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the country belongs to */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent the country is located in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_data" (
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the investment data pertains to */,
  "investment_2010_2014" REAL /* Total investment from 2010 to 2014 */,
  "investment_2015_2019" REAL /* Total investment from 2015 to 2019 */,
  "investment_2020_2024" REAL /* Total investment from 2020 to 2024 */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the investment belongs to (e.g., manufacturing, services) */,
  "investment_type" TEXT /* Type of investment (e.g., FDI, portfolio investment) */,
  "source_country" TEXT /* Country of origin for the investment */,
  "id_row" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the row, often used for joining or merging datasets */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_data_investment_type FOREIGN KEY ("investment_type") REFERENCES investment_types ("investment_type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_data_sector FOREIGN KEY ("sector") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who accessed the data */,
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the investment data accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "query_parameters" TEXT /* Query parameters used for filtering or sorting data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_investment_id FOREIGN KEY ("investment_id") REFERENCES investment_data ("investment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the investment data used in the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report generated */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the generated report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_investment_id FOREIGN KEY ("investment_id") REFERENCES investment_data ("investment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the investment data used for prediction */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "predicted_value" REAL /* Predicted investment value */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction (e.g., 0.8, 0.9) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_investment_id FOREIGN KEY ("investment_id") REFERENCES investment_data ("investment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "sector_description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_types" (
  "investment_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment type */,
  "investment_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the investment type */,
  "investment_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the investment type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investment_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "region_description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)
